data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Google enforces strong SSL/TLS encryption across its services.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 used to secure data transfer between users and servers.

data.title: Safe Browsing
data.description: Proactive protection against potential phishing sites and malware.
data.technical_spec: Database feeds browsers with updates on unsafe sites.

data.title: Account Security Measures
data.description: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) is encouraged for user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Uses SMS, authenticator apps, and hardware keys for MFA.

data.title: Infrastructure Security
data.description: Data centers are equipped with extensive physical and logical security.
data.technical_spec: Custom hardware, identity management, and secure boot processes.

data.title: Vulnerability Reward Program
data.description: Bug bounty program to incentivize discovery of security flaws.
data.technical_spec: Rewards for researchers identifying vulnerabilities across products.
